notableEvents.label: Mickey Moniak GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Moniak grounds into a double play, second baseman Jake Cronenworth to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Edouard Julien out at 2nd. Mickey Moniak out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Willi Castro pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Willi Castro flies out to third baseman Manny Machado in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Jackson Merrill plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Merrill hit by pitch. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 2nd.
